weave.notes: Clean login page. Supports email/password, passkey, SSO. Has 'Remember me' and passkey setup options. Billing portal at /payments/invoices requires auth. Weave Payments accepts credit/debit cards, ACH, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Affirm, Link by Stripe. Text-to-pay and online bill pay features. Also has auth.getweave.com and app2.getweave.com/sign-in portals.

solutionreach.billing_url: [behind auth - no public billing portal found]
solutionreach.notes: Simple username/password login with 'Remember me'. Extremely slow load time (8882ms). SR Pay product accepts debit/credit/HSA/FSA cards via text message payment links. Uses Singular Payments for credit processing. CareCredit integration for financing. Also has app.solutionreach.com/login (SR Health) and prweb.solutionreach.com (PatientReach Mobile).

tebra.billing_url: [behind auth - billing managed within Kareo PM app]
ux_issues: Hub page, not direct login - must click through to Kareo or PatientPop sub-apps
tebra.notes: Sign-in page is a hub linking to two separate apps: Practice Operations (Kareo) and Practice Growth (PatientPop). Tebra Payments accepts credit/debit cards, ACH transfers, mobile wallets, and recurring payments. Billing management via My Account in Kareo PM. Has Qualified Messenger chat widget embedded on login page.

ux_issues: Terms of Use link uses HTTP instead of HTTPS (http://www.ooma.com/terms)
ooma.notes: Login page has Admin/User tabs. Accepts phone number + password or email-based login. Has referral program banner ($5,000). PC Magazine winner badge displayed. Billing managed via Account page in Office Manager. Accepts credit cards, debit cards, internet banking. account.ooma.com is separate billing/account portal. Also has manage.oomaenterprise.com for enterprise.

spoton.billing_url: [behind auth - billing managed within SpotOn dashboard]
ux_issues: Login hosted on third-party domain (genius.io via Azure B2C) - may confuse users
spoton.notes: Fastest load time (840ms). POS login redirects to Azure B2C on login.retail.genius.io domain. Simple email/password form. SpotOn offers templated invoicing, secure payment portal, recurring payments, virtual terminal. Integrated payment processing across POS, online ordering, and invoicing. Also has client.restaurantpos.spoton.com for restaurant FOH.

_metadata.notes: All billing portals require authentication. No credentials were used. Screenshots captured of login pages only. Billing/payment capability data sourced from web search of help docs and marketing pages.
